card.text_raw_chs:

card.text_upgraded_chs:

card.text_raw_eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
